title: Create Big Cannons: Fire Support
description: This datapack/mod adds the ability to call fire support
body:
# What does this datapack adds?
This datapack adds the ability to call fire support, like HE, Smoke and incendiary. 
It was primarly created for server owners

<details>
First of all, give fire support, by running one of these commands:

```
/function cbcfiresupport:give/he_support
/function cbcfiresupport:give/smoke_support
/function cbcfiresupport:give/incendiary_support
```

After that, look at the location where you want to call a fire support and use item, and after some time fire support will hit the target
<summary>How to use:
</details>


<details>
Disable sound effect

```
/scoreboard players set #disableSound cbcfiresupport 1
```

Change cooldown on calling fire support (in seconds)

```
/scoreboard players set #cd cbcfiresupport ...
```

<summary>Options:
</details>
